ai_output_policy: AI assistants working on this project must ONLY provide bash commands for the human to copy and paste into their own terminal. NEVER instruct the human to download a file, open a text editor, or run nano/vim/similar interactive editor commands. All file edits must be done via bash/python one-liners or heredocs the human can paste directly.

archive.description: Retired/historical material moved out of this report to prevent bloat. Nothing here is deleted — everything remains fully recoverable. This report is the index; Archive/ is the storage.

contents.master_report_backups/: Timestamped full backups of Master_Report.json taken before each major edit session
contents.changelog/changelog_pre_2026-07-01.json: 41 changelog entries dated before 2026-07-01, moved out 2026-07-21 to reduce report bloat
contents.build_py_backups/: Superseded build.py.bak files found at project root, relocated 2026-07-21
contents.rules_consolidation/pre_consolidation_ru: Original triplicated ai_governance/AI_READ_THIS_FIRST/session_workflow rules text, before consolidation into a single canonical list on 2026-07-21
contents.known_issues/resolved_issues.json: Resolved known_issues entries moved out to reduce report bloat, starting 2026-07-21 with contact_form_required_fields_wrong

directory_roles.build/: Generated output only - do not edit

cookie_banner.notes: Cookie banner inlined directly into base.html — engine has no include system. Do not use {% include %} tags.

data_schema.summary: Site has 47,313 pages total. Source of truth: data/pages.json. Full audit snapshot (as of 2026-06-11), field breakdown, slug prefix stats, and GSC totals archived separately.

build_pipeline.homepage_note: Homepage added to pages.json as slug home on 2026-06-11. build.py must copy build/home/index.html to build/index.html after every build.
build_pipeline.deploy_note: CORRECTED 2026-07-03: the --exclude=index.html flag was removed. It was originally meant to be temporary until homepage_copy_step was confirmed working (it was, since 2026-06-11) but was never removed from this report. As a result, every deploy for weeks silently skipped index.html while reporting success, so homepage changes never went live no matter how many times a deploy ran. ALWAYS deploy the full build/ directory including index.html unless there is a specific, currently-active reason to exclude it -- and if there ever is, put an expiry condition on it here, not just a note.
build_pipeline.snapshot_scripts: snapshot.sh and restore.sh created 2026-06-11 — use before every risky change
build_pipeline.sitemap_xml: Auto-generated on every build with all 47,313 URLs

rules: Never guess paths or filenames — always verify from disk, read Master Report in full before any bash command
Always prefer minimal, targeted fixes — never rewrite build.py or other core files from scratch
Never duplicate components
Preserve single source of truth (data/pages.json)
Respect all protected directories — NEVER modify files inside ./build/ or run sed/perl/regex on build/ files; it is ephemeral and fully overwritten on every build
Validate against actual project structure — parse this entire Master Report before generating any bash commands; no blind regex strings or file overwrites without tracking state dependencies first
Master Report must be appended only — never delete fields
Single site build command for development, all sites for production only

Whenever a homepage or other special slug is renamed in pages.json, build.py copy-logic referencing the old slug path must be updated in the same change — verify by checking build.py for hardcoded slug paths whenever a slug rename is made. See changelog 2026-06-30.

Before trusting any deploy command copied from this report, verify it does not exclude a file the current task needs to change. A successful rsync exit code only proves the files it was told to sync were synced. Check the live file directly via SSH before re-running the same deploy command again.
NEVER commit directly to main during a session without explicit human confirmation — no exceptions
NEVER deploy via GitHub Actions rsync — manual rsync only
NEVER leave send.php redirecting anywhere other than /thank-you/
Content changes go in data/pages.json only
Layout changes go in theme/base.html only if unavoidable
build.py must generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml on every build
Homepage slug rule: after every build, copy build/{homepage_slug}/index.html to build/index.html
ALWAYS run bash snapshot.sh "label" at the START of every session, before any other action, and again before EVERY subsequent risky change — snapshots save to the snapshots/ folder
ALWAYS verify changes with a read-back command before building or declaring a task done
ALWAYS batch fact-finding commands into a single paste
ALWAYS confirm best practice and no guessing with every command
Never make changes without telling the human exactly what will change first
AI must only ever give the user bash commands to copy and paste into their own terminal — never instruct the user to download a file, open a text editor, or use nano/vim/similar commands

Bloat prevention: verbose technical detail (root-cause narratives, multi-paragraph incident write-ups, audit data dumps, structured stats) goes in reference/ as its own file, never inline in this report. This report only ever holds a one-line summary + a '_reference' pointer to the file. When adding new detailed findings, follow the pattern already used for known_issues and data_schema.

No deploy is complete until BOTH build-time verification (build.py required_files check) AND post-deploy live verification (deploy.sh Stage 3: homepage/robots.txt/sitemap.xml HTTP checks + manual_form_test.sh) have passed and their output has been shown to the human. A successful rsync or a successful build.py exit code alone is NOT sufficient to declare a deploy done -- always run deploy.sh end-to-end and report its final PASS/FAIL summary.

MANDATORY: all edits to this file must go through report_utils.load_report() / save_report() (see report_utils.py), never raw json.dump(). save_report() lints automatically BEFORE writing (changelog entries <=200 chars, known_issues entries <=300 chars) and refuses to touch the file on disk if the rule would be violated -- so bloat cannot land even if the AI forgets to check manually. report_lint.py remains available as a standalone read-only check.

ONLY deployment method is: bash deploy.sh (run from project root). It runs build -> rsync -> Stage 3 live verification (homepage, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, both contact forms) in one command and fails loudly if any stage fails. NEVER run a bare rsync command by itself again -- deploy.sh is the single source of truth for deployment, full stop.

changelog.change: 9 of the 26 service hub pages were found returning 410 Gone live (regression from Task 20, which only covered 12 of 26 hub slugs). [full detail: reference/changelog_full_entries_2026-07-21.md]
Corrected task 22: the 5 remaining hub pages (old-caravan-collection, black-bag-collection, house-clean, loft-insulation-cleared,... [full detail: reference/changelog_full_entries_2026-07-21.md]
Root-caused and fixed silent homepage deploy failure: deploy_command had --exclude=index.html left over from an earlier caution note; homepage... [see reference/changelog_full_entries_2026-07-21.md]
Contact form fields verified directly from assets/send.php (identical copies confirmed in build/send.php and build/assets/send.php via diff):... [see reference/changelog_full_entries_2026-07-21.md]
Fixed manual_form_test.sh false positives (wrong expected status code + wrong payload for send-popup.php). See reference/session_detail_2026-07-21.md.
Confirmed via source read that build.py + deploy.sh already had build-time and post-deploy verification (task 23 items 1-2 DONE).
Verified 2026-06-11 bulk UK title update did not corrupt South West pages (0 classification flips). Task 23 item 4 DONE.
Added permanent ai_governance rule requiring build-time + post-deploy checks before any deploy is complete. Task 23 item 5 DONE.
Added explicit division field (uk/southwest) to all 47,313 pages.json records; build.py now reads it directly instead of inferring. Task 23 item 3 DONE -- task 23 fully complete, archived.
Fixed build.py non-deterministic template selection (hash(slug) randomization bug found during division migration testing) -- replaced with... [see reference/changelog_full_entries_2026-07-21.md]
Deployed contact form fix via deploy.sh — build, rsync, and Stage 3 live verification all passed. Confirmed email delivery working live.

known_issues.yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml

migration.reason: All Jekyll _data, _layouts, _includes content already rendered into data/pages.json body_content fields.

deployment_workflow.notes: Deployment to Plesk not configured; artifact uploads build/
deployment_workflow.github_actions_status: build-only — no rsync, never deploys to Plesk

mandatory_session_workflow: 1. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run at the START of every session, before any other action
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run again before EVERY subsequent risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. Commit and push manually only after local build verified clean AND human has confirmed
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git reset --hard HEAD~1
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.deploy_command: bash deploy.sh — ONLY correct method. Do full build+deploy+verify, never bare rsync.
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.send_php_deploy: Deployed automatically as part of bash deploy.sh (build/ includes send.php)
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.github_actions: build-only — NO rsync in deploy.yml — all deploys are manual rsync from local machine
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.ai_rules: CONSOLIDATED 2026-07-21 — see ai_governance.rules for the single canonical rules list. This field no longer duplicates them, to prevent drift between copies. Original pre-consolidation text archived at Archive/rules_consolidation/pre_consolidation_rules_backup.json.
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.reference_folder_note: reference/ contains verbose technical detail split out to keep this report lean: known_issues_detail.json, data_schema_detail.json. This report holds summaries only — always check reference/ before assuming a one-line summary is the complete picture.
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.session_playbook: ../AI_PLAYBOOK.md — shared session rules for ALL sites/ projects. Read this in addition to this Master Report at the start of every session.

session_workflow.description: Mandatory workflow for every AI session
session_workflow.before_any_work: Read Master_Report.json in full — no exceptions
session_workflow.before_risky_change: bash snapshot.sh "description" — snapshots all critical files
session_workflow.restore_from_snapshot: bash restore.sh snapshots/TIMESTAMP_label — restores all critical files
session_workflow.session_end: Commit with descriptive message, push to GitHub, update Master Report changelog
session_workflow.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git branch -D session-BRANCHNAME
session_workflow.ai_mandatory_rules: CONSOLIDATED 2026-07-21 — see ai_governance.rules for the single canonical rules list. Original pre-consolidation text archived at Archive/rules_consolidation/pre_consolidation_rules_backup.json.
session_workflow.mandatory_session_workflow: CONSOLIDATED 2026-07-21 — see AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.mandatory_session_workflow for the single canonical workflow. session_start.sh and session_end.sh do NOT exist on disk and must not be referenced or invented — only snapshot.sh and restore.sh are real, confirmed-working scripts. Original pre-consolidation text archived at Archive/rules_consolidation/pre_consolidation_rules_backup.json.

recovery.description: Full site recovery from scratch — two commands only
recovery.note: All assets, content, and build logic are in the repo. pages.json tracked via Git LFS — ensure lfs: true on checkout.

ai_incident_log.description: Permanent log of AI errors on this project — read before every session
ai_incident_log.permanent_fix: AI must read this entire Master Report before generating any bash commands. No assumptions. No guessing. Verify everything from disk.

tasks.task: Check GSC sitemap status and indexing progress
tasks.detail: Sitemap submitted to GSC on 2026-06-11 with 47,313 URLs. Check 1: 48 hours after submission (2026-06-13) — confirm sitemap status shows Success, URL count close to 47,313, no coverage errors. Check 2: 2 weeks after submission (2026-06-25) — check indexing progress on service hub pages and location pages. AI NOTE: At start of next session after 2026-06-25, remind user to pull fresh GSC data and compare indexed URL count against 47,313 submitted. Look for coverage errors, excluded pages, and crawl anomalies.

pending_tasks.archived_tasks_note: 22 completed tasks moved to Archive/pending_tasks/completed_tasks.json (21 on 2026-07-21 initial cleanup, +1 task id 23 on 2026-07-21). Source of truth for completed task history is now that file.

gsc_setup.reference_note: GSC data (key.json, gsc_queries.csv, service account reference file) moved to gsc_data/ at project root on 2026-07-21 for organization. This is LIVE data, not archived material -- do not confuse with Archive/. NOTE: the shared export scripts at ~/gsc/export_gsc.py and ~/gsc/export_gsc_pages.py are currently hardcoded to site_RRC's path, not site_BAT's -- they must be repointed (see gsc_setup.key_path_fix and output_path_fix sed commands) before running a fresh GSC export for this site. The gsc_queries.csv in this folder is the last export pulled while the scripts still pointed at site_BAT and should not be treated as current.

image_seo.twitter_image: wired in base.html via {{ image }} token
image_seo.next_action: Replace placeholder with real service-specific photos. Update image field in pages.json per service type.

reference_files.audit_2026-07-21: reference/audit_2026-07-21.md — Fact-finding audit of modular architecture practice, send.php/robots.txt/sitemap.xml deployment integrity, and South West vs UK division separation. Found 4 unresolved risks, ranked by severity, including conditional build copy steps that can silently succeed with missing critical files, and division separation that is inferred (not enforced) via body_content emptiness. Phase 4 fix work is PENDING — see pending_tasks id 23.
reference_files.session_detail_2026-07-21: reference/session_detail_2026-07-21.md — Full detail on manual_form_test.sh fix, build.py hash-randomization fix, and completed PHASE 4 task 23, condensed out of the main report on 2026-07-21 per bloat-prevention rule.
reference_files.changelog_full_entries_2026-07-21: reference/changelog_full_entries_2026-07-21.md — Full original text of changelog entries that exceeded the 200-char bloat-prevention limit, condensed inline on 2026-07-21.
